label: Kalibr cruise missiles — Black Sea to Kyiv
damage: Power grid damage; multiple cities lost electricity
notes: Part of Russia's coordinated mass strike campaign targeting Ukrainian energy infrastructure beginning Oct 2022

label: Shahed-136 drone swarm — Kyiv area
damage: Multiple hits on infrastructure in Kyiv Oblast
notes: One of the largest single-night drone attacks of the war; Ukraine claimed record interception rate

label: Neptune missiles — Moskva flagship sunk
damage: Russian Black Sea Fleet flagship Moskva sunk — largest naval loss since Falklands War

label: Kinzhal hypersonic missiles — Kyiv
damage: None — first confirmed interception of Kinzhal by Patriot
notes: Ukraine's Patriot system intercepted Russia's supposedly 'invincible' Kinzhal missiles, undermining Russian hypersonic propaganda

label: Storm Shadow — Kerch Bridge strike
damage: Significant damage to roadway span of Kerch Bridge; disrupted supply route to Crimea

label: HIMARS — Russian ammunition depot Tokmak
damage: Major ammunition depot destroyed; Russia forced to move supplies 80+ km from front

label: Iskander-M — Zaporizhzhia apartment building
damage: 17 killed, 60+ injured; residential building collapsed

label: Shahed drones — Odesa grain port
damage: Grain storage and port infrastructure damaged; Russia exited grain deal same day
notes: Attack came hours after Russia withdrew from Black Sea Grain Initiative

label: ATACMS — Crimea airfield strike
damage: Russian military helicopters destroyed at Berdiansk; significant damage to Russian aviation assets

label: Kh-101 cruise missiles — Winter 2024 energy strikes
damage: Major hits on Kharkiv, Kyiv, Odesa power substations; widespread blackouts
notes: Part of Russia's sustained winter 2023–24 energy terror campaign

label: Ukrainian drones — Belgorod, Russia
damage: Civilian infrastructure damage in Belgorod; Russia complained to UN
notes: Ukraine targeted Russian border region that serves as base for attacks on Kharkiv Oblast

label: Ukrainian long-range drones — Saratov refinery
damage: Oil refinery damaged; fires burned for hours; Russia's Saratov region 1,200 km from Ukraine

label: Iskander-M — Kramatorsk train station
damage: 59 civilians killed, 100+ injured at crowded train station as evacuees fled east

label: Neptune missiles — Black Sea patrol vessel sunk
damage: Russian patrol vessel Vasily Bekh sunk while resupplying Snake Island garrison

label: Kh-47 Kinzhal — Kharkiv residential areas
damage: Residential buildings struck; 8 killed, 47 injured

label: Storm Shadow — Millerovo airbase (Russia)
damage: Russian military airbase in Rostov Oblast hit; Su-30 aircraft and hangars damaged

label: Largest Shahed drone attack — Aug 2024
damage: Power infrastructure damaged in multiple oblasts; partial blackouts
notes: Russia launched the largest single drone attack of the war; Ukraine claimed record intercepts

label: North Korean KN-23 ballistic missile — Dnipro
damage: Apartment building struck; 18 killed including children; DPRK-supplied missile confirmed by forensic evidence
notes: Confirmed as North Korean KN-23 by US and Ukrainian forensic analysis

label: Ukrainian drones — Kremlin area, Moscow
damage: Minor; drones downed over Kremlin; no injuries; Russia blamed Ukraine; Ukraine denied direct involvement
notes: Ukraine did not officially claim responsibility; some analysts attributed to Ukrainian special operations

label: ATACMS — Saki airbase Crimea
damage: Russian military aircraft destroyed; Saki air base significantly damaged
